sources.description: European closed-qualifier schedule. J:P carries schedule slots; R:U supplies exact day-three through day-six match dependencies.
North American qualifier schedule using the workbook's CEST conversion column N.
South American qualifier schedule using the workbook's CEST conversion column N.
Barcelona LAN schedule slots using scheduled CEST column O; hidden arrival and earliest-start columns M:N are excluded.

date.description: Local schedule date derived from the day header.

time.description: Scheduled start time in the common CEST/Europe-Madrid column.

team_a.description: Participant parsed from the workbook's compound match text.

team_b.description: Participant parsed from the workbook's compound match text.

stage.description: Stable stage context for this record set.

bo.description: Best-of value from the row or stable sheet-level schedule context.

match_label.description: Workbook match identifier or scheduled slot label.

metadata.notes: Schema-valid draft for all 68 visible series slots. Fourteen EU qualifier records with explicitly pending times remain exportable with time_pending warnings and blank UTC values. EU, NA, and SA coordinates follow the current public layout; the obsolete NA August 3 record set is disabled. Duplicate checks ignore rows only when both participants are declared placeholders. LAN participants remain explicit TBD placeholders until match assignments are published.
